productDisplayName: Vans Men Black Era Pro Shoes
description: Round toed, black shoes with central lace fastening and has a classic skate feel with improved cushioning Canvas upper with leather overlays, DURACAP Upper which means that there is Ollie area reinforcement and a micro thin rubber layer for added support Co – Molded PU1 Footbed which has a single density foam and offers improved Fit, padded at the mouth and tongue Has a combination insole board which allows the shoe to flex at the ball of your foot while the heel remains stable EVA midsole with DURACAP Toe Bumper in the form of extra layer of rubber which prolongs shoe life Vulcanised rubber signature waffle outsole with scooped out diamonds shaped grooves
